creator: lev@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Please, note, that all BDB support is derived from `devel/apr' library, and its port doesn't support other versions of DBD but 4.2. 
APR library supports any 4.x DBD version by itself, it is not APR, but port problem. So, you need to change `devel/apr' port, not `devel/subversion' one!
